
# Modern Philosophy of Mind

## Chapter Purpose

Discuss Descartes, dualism, materialism, idealism, phenomenology, Whitehead, and modern philosophical theories of mind.

## Suggested Topics

- 
- 
- 

## Suggested Figures or Tables

- 
- 
- 

## Key Questions

- 
- 
- 

## Notes

Add examples, references, equations, diagrams, case studies, or comparative discussions here.
